body.para: The Signal (Warning) lamp notifies the operator of the machine operating status. The signal lamp has three lights: Red, yellow and green. A buzzer is an available option.

table.style: border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:11px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
